coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that enables dual-screen video playback, allowing simultaneous display of multiple video streams and/or presentation slides in configurable layouts (PiP, Side-by-Side, Single Media).

featureOwnership: Single Media view with minimized secondary player
Video synchronization between primary and secondary players
Slide/presentation image synchronization with cue points
Image player for displaying presentation slides
Responsive layout management based on player size
External layout control via Kaltura Webcast Studio cue points

dataHandling.name: DualScreenConfig
dataHandling.description: Plugin configuration for layout, position, child player size, and aspect ratio

dataHandling.name: Layout State
dataHandling.description: Current dual-screen layout mode (PIP, PIPInverse, SideBySide, SideBySideInverse, SingleMedia, SingleMediaInverse, Hidden)

dataHandling.name: DualScreenPlayer
dataHandling.description: Player instances array tracking video/image players and their container assignments (primary, secondary, none)

dataHandling.name: VideoSyncManager
dataHandling.description: Manages playback rate adjustment and seeking to keep secondary video synchronized with primary

dataHandling.name: ImageSyncManager
dataHandling.description: Manages slide image display based on timed cue points from kalturaCuepoints service

dataHandling.name: SlideItem
dataHandling.description: Slide image metadata including dimensions, loading state, and portrait orientation

dataHandling.name: PiP Position
dataHandling.description: Current position of PiP child player (bottom-left, bottom-right, top-left, top-right)

dataHandling.name: ExternalLayout
dataHandling.description: Layout commands received from external sources like Kaltura Webcast Studio

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Core Kaltura Player providing BasePlugin class, event system, and player API

upstream.name: playkit-kaltura-cuepoints
upstream.description: Provides timed metadata for slides and view-change cue points

upstream.name: playkit-timeline
upstream.description: Timeline service for thumbnail info integration

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js-ui
upstream.description: UI components and preact framework for rendering

upstream.name: Kaltura BE API
upstream.description: Provides secondary media entries via baseEntry.list API with parentEntryIdEqual filter

downstream.name: Kaltura Player V7
downstream.description: Main player application that loads and configures this plugin

downstream.name: Kaltura Webcast Studio
downstream.description: Sends view-change cue points to control dual-screen layout externally

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura baseEntry.list API
externalAPIs.description: Used by SecondaryMediaLoader to fetch child entries for multi-camera/dual-screen content

externalAPIs.name: kalturaCuepoints service
externalAPIs.description: Player service providing slide cue points (THUMB type, SLIDE subtype) and view-change cue points (CODE type)

externalAPIs.name: timeline service
externalAPIs.description: Player service for registering dual-screen thumbnail provider

externalAPIs.name: kava plugin
externalAPIs.description: Analytics plugin whose config is cloned for secondary players

externalAPIs.name: kaltura-live plugin
externalAPIs.description: Live streaming plugin whose config is cloned for secondary players

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration entry point - registers 'dualscreen' plugin with Kaltura Player
Main plugin class (DualScreen) extending BasePlugin - core logic for layout management, player synchronization, and UI components
Video synchronization logic between primary and secondary video players
Slide image synchronization logic based on timed cue points
Image player class for displaying and preloading presentation slides
Provider loader for fetching secondary media entries from Kaltura BE
